candidate_lines.line: • Try bargaining with the Get Out of Jail Free card, if you have it.
• Sell them your properties to pay off the debt.
If you still cannot pay, you must give all your properties to the player you owe.
Sell your properties to the Bank to pay off your debt.
If you still cannot pay the Bank…
Return the Get Out of Jail Free card to the bottom of the Chance pile, if you have it.
HOW DO I GET OUT OF JAIL?

Pay a fine of A50 before your turn.

turn, you must pay the A50 fine.
get out of jail immediately and move
Move your token to the “In Jail” space
Do not collect A200 for passing
You may still collect
Pay the price on the board space and
If another player owns it, pay the RENT amount shown on the space to the owner.
Every time you pass or land on GO, collect A200 from the Bank.
Immediately move to the next unowned property.
Pay the amount shown on the space to the Bank.
Nothing happens here, just take a break!
• Take the top Chance card, read it out loud,
• Return used cards to the bottom of the pile.
Roll both dice and move your ship token that number of spaces
Always move forward, never backward.
If you roll a double, move, then roll the dice again, and take another turn.
If you roll a double three times in the same turn, you must go to jail!
Force Stealth: Move to any unowned space and purchase this space for free.
collect A200 for passing GO.
Do not collect A200 for passing GO.
Force Pull: Move any player to one of your owned properties and collect rent.
Force Dash: Move directly to GO and collect A200.
